headline: Chevron (CVX) Reports Q1 EPS Beat
summary: Chevron Corporation (NYSE:CVX) is one of the 10 Must-Buy Stocks with the Strongest 1Q2026 Earnings Beats. On May 1, 2026, Chevron Corporation (NYSE:CVX) reported Q1 adjusted EPS of $1.41 versus a 97c consensus and revenue of $48.61B compared to $52.7B expected. CEO Mike Wirth said results showed “solid” performance despite geopolitical volatility, pointing to strong […]

headline: Shell Profit Climbs as Iran War Boosts Oil Price, Trading
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Shell Plc reported stronger-than-expected first-quarter earnings as the Iran war boosted trading profits and drove up energy prices, helping it to overcome a drop in oil and gas production from the conflict.
